transcript.content: We are willing to settle at $60,000 to avoid litigation costs on both sides.
$60,000 is significant. We need to understand your damages calculation.
Our legal fees alone would be $40,000 through trial. We present $60,000 as a compromise.
That seems high. Our exposure analysis suggests $35,000 is more appropriate.
We have key testimony that strengthens our position. $50,000 is our absolute floor.
